meta.question: Does this model include any exclusive gateways? (Model ID: 2b18c5f00a5a46159c6cb6a3e2bc79e9)
meta.finalAnswer:
Yes, the model with ID 2b18c5f00a5a46159c6cb6a3e2bc79e9 includes 4 exclusive gateways. Their URIs are:
- https://www.teamingai-project.eu/kg/process/qualityInspection/sid-F8DDC641-8806-488E-85B1-1D9252C11FC1
- https://www.teamingai-project.eu/kg/process/qualityInspection/sid-ADB28F9F-9693-486D-890B-4A1EE4106A01
- https://www.teamingai-project.eu/kg/process/qualityInspection/sid-F726F0A0-F3A2-4DE5-8DB0-9FB14E37ED3D
- https://www.teamingai-project.eu/kg/process/qualityInspection/sid-C4AE4C53-121B-4BE0-B7EC-2D87282BD352

request.query:
prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?gateway ?name WHERE {
  ?model a bboExt:Model .
  ?model tai:originalId "2b18c5f00a5a46159c6cb6a3e2bc79e9" .
  ?definitions tai:belongsTo ?model .
  ?choreo tai:belongsTo ?definitions .
  ?gateway tai:belongsTo ?choreo .
  ?gateway a bboExt:ExclusiveGateway .
  OPTIONAL { ?gateway bbo:name ?name . }
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: The query successfully identified 4 exclusive gateways within the specified model. The results confirm the presence of these elements.
